message.content:
(1) The visible section is the **Contact** page (from the highlighted `/contact` nav item).  
(2) The contact form has a two-column layout:  
- Left: Contact details (email, location, work status, tech stack, social links, and a "schedule a call" button).  
- Right: A form with three required fields (`NAME`, `EMAIL`, `MESSAGE`) and a bright green "send message" button.  
(3) Notable details: A "protected · rate-limited" notice below the form (indicating anti-spam/rate-limiting measures) and a footer with copyright, deployment info, and sitemap/RSS links.
